case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 612 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2287/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 09-09-2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 29-11-2023. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this petition, which prima facie suggests that the Petitioner, who is appearing in person has lost his interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
